name: section_subheading
label: Section Subheading
default: The challenge facing every operator in this industry.

children.name: description
children.label: Card Description
children.default: Describe the challenge or solution here.

default.title: Vendor Sprawl
default.description: The average operator connects to 15–30 third-party vendors, each with unique APIs, authentication mechanisms, and data schemas that must be individually integrated and maintained.

default.title: Engineering Drain
default.description: Building and maintaining custom integrations requires dedicated engineering teams. A single integration can take weeks. Multiply that across every vendor in your stack, then factor in ongoing maintenance.

default.title: Compliance Complexity
default.description: Multi-jurisdiction requirements mandate different data flows, reporting formats, and audit trails per market. Each jurisdiction may require specific providers and reporting standards.
